title: Aust-Telemark

infobox.value: (lit. 'East-Telemark') is a [traditional district](/wiki/Districts_of_Norway "Districts of Norway") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county in [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The district comprises five municipalities: [Hjartdal](/wiki/Hjartdal "Hjartdal"), [Midt-Telemark](/wiki/Midt-Telemark_(municipality) "Midt-Telemark (municipality)"), [Nome](/wiki/Nome,_Norway "Nome, Norway"), [Notodden](/wiki/Notodden "Notodden"), and [Tinn](/wiki/Tinn "Tinn"). The largest population centres in the region are the cities [Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)") and [Rjukan](/wiki/Rjukan "Rjukan"), of which Notodden is by far the largest with about 9,000 inhabitants. Hjartdal is scarcely populated.[[4]](#cite_note-ssb-4)[[5]](#cite_note-snl-5)
[Statistisk sentralbyrå](/wiki/Statistics_Norway "Statistics Norway"). ["09280: Area of land and fresh water (km²) (M)"](https://www.ssb.no/en/statbank/table/09280/) (in Norwegian).

[Statistisk sentralbyrå](/wiki/Statistics_Norway "Statistics Norway"). ["Table: 06913: Population 1 January and population changes during the calendar year (M)"](https://www.ssb.no/en/statbank/table/06913/) (in Norwegian).
["Navn på steder og personer: Innbyggjarnamn"](https://www.sprakradet.no/sprakhjelp/Skriverad/navn-pa-steder-og-personer/Innbyggjarnamn/) (in Norwegian). Språkrådet.

[Statistisk sentralbyrå](/wiki/Statistics_Norway "Statistics Norway") (1 January 2022). ["Urban settlements. Population and area, by municipality"](https://www.ssb.no/en/befolkning/statistikker/beftett/aar).

Jukvam, Dag (1999). ["Historisk oversikt over endringer i kommune- og fylkesinndelingen"](http://www.ssb.no/emner/00/90/rapp_9913/rapp_9913.pdf) (PDF) (in Norwegian). [Statistisk sentralbyrå](/wiki/Statistics_Norway "Statistics Norway").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

District in Telemark, Norway

**Aust-Telemark** (lit. 'East-Telemark') is a [traditional district](/wiki/Districts_of_Norway "Districts of Norway") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county in [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The district comprises five municipalities: [Hjartdal](/wiki/Hjartdal "Hjartdal"), [Midt-Telemark](/wiki/Midt-Telemark_(municipality) "Midt-Telemark (municipality)"), [Nome](/wiki/Nome,_Norway "Nome, Norway"), [Notodden](/wiki/Notodden "Notodden"), and [Tinn](/wiki/Tinn "Tinn"). The largest population centres in the region are the cities [Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)") and [Rjukan](/wiki/Rjukan "Rjukan"), of which Notodden is by far the largest with about 9,000 inhabitants. Hjartdal is scarcely populated.[[4]](#cite_note-ssb-4)[[5]](#cite_note-snl-5)

Historically, the district was made up of the three munincipalities/parishes of Hjartdal, Tinn, and [Heddal](/wiki/Heddal "Heddal"), which were created in 1837 when the [formannskapsdistrikt](/wiki/Formannskapsdistrikt "Formannskapsdistrikt") laws came into effect. In 1860, [Gransherad](/wiki/Gransherad "Gransherad") municipality was created from portions of Tinn and Hjartdal. [Hovin](/wiki/Hovin,_Telemark "Hovin, Telemark") municipality was created by a split from Gransherad in 1886, and Notodden by a split from Heddal in 1913. In 1964 Heddal and Gransherad were incorporated into Notodden whereas Hovin was incorporated into Tinn.[[6]](#cite_note-6) More recently, the areas of [Midt-Telemark](/wiki/Midt-Telemark_(municipality) "Midt-Telemark (municipality)") and [Nome](/wiki/Nome,_Norway "Nome, Norway") have been included in Aust-Telemark as well, although they were historically included in the old *Nedre Telemark* district ("Lower Telemark"), but that district is not really used anymore in favor of the [Grenland](/wiki/Grenland "Grenland") district name which has slightly different boundaries.[[5]](#cite_note-snl-5)

Notable people from Aust-Telemark include [Myllarguten](/wiki/Myllarguten "Myllarguten") (1801-1872), legendary fiddler from Sauherad, [Klaus Egge](/wiki/Klaus_Egge "Klaus Egge") (1906-1979), composer from Gransherad and [Hans Herbjørnsrud](/wiki/Hans_Herbj%C3%B8rnsrud "Hans Herbjørnsrud") (born 1938), author from Heddal.
